title: best herbal teas for high blood pressure
description: Silybum marianum tea contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, triterpenoid saponins, and alkaloids that contribute to its potential health benefits, including the treatment of high blood pressure. The diuretic properties of this herbal tea help to reduce fluid retention and lower blood pressure, while its antioxidant properties help to protect blood vessels from oxidative damage.
